_description: Ira's Knowledge Coverage Map — shows what she knows deeply vs where gaps exist
_purpose: Helps Ira prioritize what to ingest next to fill knowledge gaps

machine_coverage._note: Each machine model scored by: doc_refs (import files mentioning it), spec_completeness (% of key fields filled), knowledge_depth (JSON backups referencing it)

well_covered._description: Models with strong documentation + complete specs — Ira is confident here

PF1-C-3020.notes: Flagship model, many quotes + manual + catalogue

partially_covered._description: Models with specs but few/no dedicated documents — Ira can answer basics but may lack depth

blind_spots._description: Models in specs DB but ZERO import documents reference them — Ira is guessing from specs alone
priority_ingestion_needed: PF2-P2010 — entire PF2 series has zero docs, need catalogues/quotes
PF2-P2020 — bath/open frame machines, no application docs
PF2-P2424 — largest PF2, zero reference material
UNO-0806 — UNO series has zero docs despite 5 keyword refs
UNO-1208 — entry-level machine, needs docs for lead qualification
UNO-1208-2H — dual heater variant, no docs
PLAY-450-DT — desktop model, no docs at all
IMG-1205 — smaller IMG, no project docs
IMG-2012 — large IMG, no project docs
PF1-X-2116 — popular size (Mirsant quotes exist but not linked)

spec_field_gaps._description: Fields missing across ALL 46 models — these are systematic gaps

price_usd.action: Add USD pricing for 30 models — critical for international quotes

max_draw_depth_mm.action: Add draw depth for 41 models — customers always ask this

clamping_force.action: Zero models have clamping force — need from engineering

cycle_time.action: Zero models have cycle time data — need from production

base_price_usd.action: No base USD prices — derive from INR or add separately

knowledge_domain_depth._description: How deep Ira's knowledge is per domain, based on ingested JSON backups

pricing.notes: Strongest area — 206 pricing knowledge entries from quotes

customer.notes: 30 customer profiles — could use more from CRM

market_intelligence.notes: Market data exists but could be richer

machine_spec.notes: Specs ingested but many fields still empty

sales_playbook.notes: Sales methodology captured but could be deeper

order.notes: Order history — 37 order docs but only 7 knowledge entries

customer_intelligence.notes: Competitive intel on customers is weak

inquiry_patterns.notes: What customers typically ask — needs more data

application.notes: Application knowledge (automotive, packaging etc) is thin

case_study.notes: Only 2 case studies despite 9 project docs

document_category_coverage._description: File counts per category in imports — shows where raw material exists vs is thin

03_Product_Catalogues.assessment: OK — covers AM, PF1, FCS, IMG. Missing: PF2, DUO, UNO, PLAY catalogues

04_Machine_Manuals_and_Specs.assessment: MODERATE — manuals for AM + PF1 only. Missing: FCS, IMG, PF2, UNO, DUO manuals

06_Market_Research_and_Analysis.assessment: THIN — only 8 research docs for entire market

09_Industry_Knowledge.assessment: THIN — thermoforming industry knowledge is sparse

11_Project_Case_Studies.assessment: THIN — only 9 case studies for 20+ years of projects

12_Emails_and_Correspondence.assessment: EMPTY — email knowledge only in quotes folder

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: 17 machine models have ZERO document references. Entire product lines (PF2, DUO, UNO, PLAY) are blind spots.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Product catalogues, spec sheets, brochures for PF2, DUO, UNO, PLAY series
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira cannot confidently recommend or quote these machines

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 35% of models have USD pricing. All have INR but international customers need USD/EUR.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: EUR/USD price lists, international quotation templates
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira struggles with international quote generation

priority_ingestion_recommendations.area: Draw Depth, Clamping Force, Cycle Time specs
priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: 0% clamping force, 0% cycle time, 11% draw depth across all 46 models.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Engineering spec sheets, production data, test reports
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: These are top-3 customer questions Ira cannot answer precisely

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 4 application knowledge entries and 2 case studies despite 20+ years of projects.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Project completion reports, customer success stories, application notes by industry
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira cannot tell compelling stories about what machines have achieved

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 4 service knowledge entries. No maintenance guides, spare parts lists, or troubleshooting docs.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Service manuals, maintenance schedules, spare parts catalogs, troubleshooting guides
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira cannot help with post-sale support questions

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 8 market research docs and 5 customer intelligence entries.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Competitor comparison sheets, industry reports (2024-2026), regional market analyses
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira lacks context for strategic sales conversations

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 1 contract document. No standard terms, warranty docs, or legal templates.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: Standard contract templates, warranty terms, payment terms, Incoterms used
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira cannot assist with contract-stage conversations

priority_ingestion_recommendations.why: Only 1 partnership knowledge entry despite FRIMO being a key partner.
priority_ingestion_recommendations.what_to_ingest: FRIMO cooperation agreement, joint project docs, technology sharing agreements
priority_ingestion_recommendations.impact: Ira doesn't understand the FRIMO relationship well enough for partner conversations
